message: Hello! I'm your BPMN Modeling Agent. I'll analyze the task now and start planning the diagram.
I've analyzed the task and defined 7 goals for the model.

Iteration 1 — setting up all required participants (pools). HR Portal will be expanded as the orchestrator; the other participants will be collapsed (blackbox) since their internal behavior is not described in detail.

I’ll now model the full HR Portal process flow (start → balance check → auto-reject or supervisor approval with 5-day escalation to HR manager → book (if approved) → notify employee with distinct end states), including explicit cross-pool message interactions.
I've reviewed the completed model. Found 10 issue(s) — details below.
⚠️ 3 critical issue(s) detected. Automatically starting correction pass 1/3…

I’ll fix the 3 critical issues: (1) rename the timer catch event to reflect '5 business days', and (2–3) add the missing GwWaitMgr → CatchMgrRejected sequence flow so the HR Manager rejection path is reachable.
I've reviewed the completed model. Found 3 issue(s) — details below.
⚠️ 1 critical issue(s) detected. Automatically starting correction pass 2/3…
Fixing the remaining critical issue by ensuring the timer catch event label exactly reflects the 5 *business* days requirement.
I've reviewed the completed model. Found 6 issue(s) — details below.
⚠️ 2 critical issue(s) detected. Automatically starting correction pass 3/3…

Iteration 1 — addressing the 2 remaining critical goals by (a) making the HR Portal start consistent with the Employee submission via a Message Start Event + message flow, and (b) clarifying the 5 *business days* timer semantics with an explicit text annotation linked to the timer event.
I've reviewed the completed model. Found 6 issue(s) — details below.
⚠️ After 3 correction attempt(s), 3 critical issue(s) remain. Please review manually.
